data.body: Plan-review PASS (signed @ a6ca3874b, 0 blocking). Triaged 5 advisories — all accepted & folded into the plan: (1) add dedicated _as_git_remote validator (not _as_git_ref) rejecting spaces/colons/tildes/control chars; (2) push.py presence guard checks the CONFIGURED remote via 'git remote get-url' (matching fsck) not 'any remote exists'; (3) tests are integration-style — fixture repo w/ two remotes + REBAR_SYNC_REMOTE, assert git invoked with the configured remote; (4) also update CLAUDE.md 'store shares every write' section (hardcodes origin/tickets), not just the git-workflow section; (5) file_impact recorded. Dropped findings correct (one vetoed: CLAUDE.md DOES have a Git-workflow section).
